ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "fulldate" TEXT /* Date in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD' */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the date */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the date (1-12) */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the date (1-31) */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "is_weekend" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the date is a weekend */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the date is a holiday */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the year (1-4) */,
  "week_of_year" INTEGER /* Week number of the year (1-53) */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Full name of the month */,
  "day_of_year" INTEGER /* Day number of the year (1-366) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "times" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time */,
  "fulltime" TEXT /* Time in the format 'HH:MM:SS' */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the time (0-23) */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the time (0-59) */,
  "second" INTEGER /* Second of the time (0-59) */,
  "is_business_hour" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the time is within business hours */,
  "is_evening" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the time is in the evening */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calendars" (
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calendar */,
  "calendar_name" TEXT /* Name of the calendar */,
  "calendar_type" TEXT /* Type of calendar (e.g., Gregorian, Fiscal) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the calendar */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the calendar */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the calendar */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the calendar */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the calendar was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calendar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendars_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calendar_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calendar the event belongs to */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the event is recurring */,
  "recurrence_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of recurrence (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendar_events_calendar_id FOREIGN KEY ("calendar_id") REFERENCES calendars ("calendar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendar_events_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calendar the holiday belongs to */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the holiday is a public holiday */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the holiday */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the holiday was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holidays_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holidays_calendar_id FOREIGN KEY ("calendar_id") REFERENCES calendars ("calendar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "date_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., 'day_of_week') */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata (e.g., 'Friday') */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_date_metadata_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_date_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., 'hour') */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata (e.g., '8') */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_metadata_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES times ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calendar_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calendar the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., 'calendar_type') */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata (e.g., 'Gregorian') */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendar_metadata_calendar_id FOREIGN KEY ("calendar_id") REFERENCES calendars ("calendar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendar_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "date_calendars" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date */,
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calendar the date belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id", "calendar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_date_calendars_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_calendars" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time */,
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calendar the time belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id", "calendar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_calendars_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
